meta.title: Avoiding Insecurity in ICS Protocols
meta.description:
Adam Crain session from S4x15 on avoiding insecurity in ICS protocols. This is a followup to his S4x14 session on Project Robus that showed huge security issues in DNP implementations.

It's noteworthy that Adam has followed this up with designing his own ICS protocol with security and is looking at Quantum Key Management at S4x18.
